summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of the unified multi-step booking flow for wildlife reserve booking application. All core features are working correctly: cart persistence via localStorage, adding items from map/safari/e-shop, checkout flow with guest account creation.
critical_code_review_comments: CartContext.jsx implements proper localStorage persistence with mtr_cart_items key
All data-testid attributes are properly set for key interactive elements
FloatingCartIndicator correctly shows cart count and hides on shopping cart page
context_for_next_testing_agent: All booking flow features tested and working. Cart persists via localStorage across React Router navigation. Add Souvenirs button navigates correctly to e-shop. Checkout creates guest account automatically.

features_tested.details: Items persist in localStorage when navigating via React Router links. Verified by adding items and checking cart count across multiple pages.

features_tested.feature: Add accommodation to cart from map page
features_tested.details: Click marker on map, view details panel with price, click Add to Cart button. Button changes to 'Added to Cart' with checkmark.

features_tested.feature: Add safari to cart from Safari Route Explorer
features_tested.details: Select date and participants, click Add to Cart. Safari (Jeep Safari - Theppakadu Circuit) added correctly with price calculation.

features_tested.feature: Navigate to e-shop via Add Souvenirs button
features_tested.details: Button found and working. Successfully navigates to /e-shop page.

features_tested.feature: Add product to cart from e-shop
features_tested.details: Click View Details to open product modal, click Add to Cart. Wildlife Photography Book added correctly.

features_tested.feature: Shopping cart page displays all items
features_tested.details: Cart page shows all 3 item types: Stay (Sylvan Lodge), Activity (Jeep Safari), Product (Wildlife Photography Book) with correct prices and totals.

features_tested.feature: Checkout flow - guest details and payment
features_tested.details: 3-step checkout: Review Cart -> Your Details -> Payment. Form validation works, demo mode payment works.
After checkout, confirmation page shows 'Your Account Has Been Created!' with email and auto-generated password.
Floating cart button shows correct count badge, hides on shopping cart page, expands to show cart summary.

features_tested.feature: Header cart badge showing correct count
features_tested.details: Header cart icon shows badge with correct item count (accounts for quantity).
